name: Total disability from forklift brain damage, lifelong care covered?
description: Comp lifetime med + disability pay; suits for extras.

mainEntity.name: Total disability from forklift brain damage, lifelong care covered?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp lifetime med + disability pay; suits for extras.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, comp covers medical forever + permanent disability lump/weekly; suits add millions.** $7M future care example.[2] Key factors: Doctor certify total; future needs calculated. UT/ID lifetime med. Max via attorney.
